title: Underwriting Auction for sale of Government Security for ₹34,000 crore on April 10, 2026
description: Government of India has announced the sale (re-issue) of Government Security, as detailed below, through auction to be held on April 10, 2026 (Friday). As per the extant scheme of underwriting commitment notified on November 14, 2007, the amounts of Minimum Underwriting Commitment (MUC) and the minimum bidding commitment under Additional Competitive Underwriting (ACU) auction, applicable to each Primary Dealer (PD), are as under: (₹ crore) Security Notified Amount MUC amount per PD Minimum
